title: Learning Loop Race Report Schema
description: Machine-enforceable schema for the Race Report filed at the end of every Learning Loop journey run (V15+). The Race Report is a permanent vault record showing the starting line baseline, the journey log at each version milestone, both runners' final status, resource transfer details, token usage, time elapsed, self-assessed score, and end state. Every V15+ run must file a Race Report validated against this schema. Failure to validate = REJECTED.

project_name.description: The project the loop was run on.

north_star_declared.description: The exact North Star statement declared in Phase 0 of this run.

journey_started_version.description: The version milestone at which this journey run started.

run_start_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the run started.

run_end_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the run ended. Null if the run stopped early without a clean end.

starting_line_baseline.description: The baseline measurements taken at the starting line before the race begins.

memory_loss_probability_start.description: Memory loss probability at the start of the run.

performance_score_start.description: Performance score at the start of the run.

version_started.description: The version the run started from.

phases_at_primal_count.description: Number of phases already at Primal threshold (95%) or above at the start.

journey_log.description: Checkpoint entries filed at each version milestone during the run.

version_milestone.description: The version milestone this checkpoint was filed at.

datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this milestone was reached.

runner_one_score.description: Innovation Runner's score at this milestone.

runner_two_probability.description: Memory Runner's memory loss probability at this milestone.

leading_runner.description: Which runner is closer to their finish line at this milestone.

tokens_used_cumulative.description: Total tokens consumed from the start of the run through this milestone.

notes.description: Structured notes on what happened at this milestone.

runner_one_final.description: Final status of the Innovation Runner (hurdles track).

finish_line_crossed.description: True if the Innovation Runner cleared all 9 hurdles.

finish_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the Innovation Runner crossed the finish line. Null if not finished.

runner_two_final.description: Final status of the Memory Runner (straight track).

finish_line_crossed.description: True if the Memory Runner drove memory loss probability below 0.01.

final_memory_loss_probability.description: Memory Runner's final memory loss probability.

finish_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the Memory Runner crossed the finish line. Null if not finished.

who_won_first.description: Which runner crossed their finish line first.

time_between_finishes_minutes.description: Minutes between the first runner finishing and the second runner finishing. Null if neither finished or both finished simultaneously.

resource_transfer.description: Details of the resource transfer when one runner finishes and pivots to help the other.

transfer_occurred.description: True if a resource transfer happened (one runner finished and pivoted to help the other).

transfer_datetime.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the transfer occurred. Null if no transfer.

resources_transferred_from.description: The runner who finished first and donated resources.

resources_transferred_to.description: The runner who received the transferred resources.

impact_description.description: Structured description of the impact the resource transfer had on the remaining runner's progress.

tokens_used_total.description: Total tokens consumed across the entire run.

time_elapsed_minutes.description: Total wall-clock time elapsed from run start to run end, in minutes.

self_assessed_final_score.description: The loop's honest self-assessment of its own output. The score cannot be inflated. If V20 was not reached, the score cannot be LEGENDARY.

score.description: Self-assessed performance score for this run.

tier.description: Performance tier corresponding to the score.

rationale.description: Honest rationale for the self-assessed score. Must explain why this score and not higher or lower.

end_state.description: The final state of the run — whether V20 was declared, what version was reached, and whether the run stopped early.

v20_declared.description: True only if V20 stop condition was met and both runners finished.

final_version_reached.description: The highest version milestone reached during this run.

stopped_early.description: True if the run stopped before reaching V20.

stop_reason.description: Reason the run stopped early. Null if the run completed to V20.

gifts_delivered.description: Confirmation that the two gifts (to the project and to the loop) were delivered and sealed in the vault.

gift_to_project_delivered.description: True if the Gift to the Project (Truth Enforcement Schema) was committed to the vault.

gift_to_loop_delivered.description: True if the Gift to the Loop (recursive improvement log) was committed to the vault.

vault_paths_sealed.description: All GitHub vault paths committed as part of this run's deliverables.

race_announcer_log.description: Play-by-play race announcer log. Each entry records a moment in the race as a plain English call — written as a race announcer describing the action live. Required. A race report without this log is invalid.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this event occurred.

phase.description: The race phase this event belongs to (e.g., 'PHASE_0_ORIENT', 'PHASE_3_HYPOTHESIZE', 'DEPLOY').

message.description: Plain English race announcer call describing what just happened. No Markdown, no bullet points. Clear declarative sentences only.
